approve.post_removed: Couldn't approve the post because it has been removed!

vote.post_removed: Couldn't [vote / un-vote] the post because the post has been removed!
vote.remove_hasnt_voted: Couldn't remove your vote: You haven't voted on this post yet!
vote.already: Couldn't cast a vote: You have already voted on this post!
vote.error: Failed to [vote / un-vote]: Unknown internal error.

update.fetch: Fetching new posts & updating data file...

re.help_404:
Reddit help file not found, someone likely deleted it.
-# Hint: You can find the official help text at https://github.com/ByteDice/ByteDiceAssistant in `re_help.md`.
**CAUTION:** The official help file may contain incorrect information if you're not using the official bot by Byte Dice.
re.post_404:
Post URL "<{0}>" not found: Post doesn't exist in the data!
-# Hint: Run the command `/re_addpost [URL]` in a Discord channel or `u/ByteDiceAssistant add_post` in a Reddit post.
re.not_mod: Permission denied: You are not a moderator of the subreddit(s) {0}
re.post_corrupted:
Post URL "<{0}>" not found: Post data is corrupted!
-# Full details: Could not find key "posts" in data file "re_data.json"
re.shorturl_fail: Couldn't convert to shortURL: Invalid Reddit URL format.

db.added_server: Added your server to my database. Thanks for letting me steal it! (/s)
db.corrupted_data: Couldn't add your server to the database! The database is corrupted!
db.server_404:
This server is not in the data!
-# Hint: Run the command `/database AddServer` inside of a Discord server (requires administrator permission).
db.wwrps_404:
Could not find `wwrps_channel` in data!
-# Hint: Run `/database WWRPSChannel` in a channel (requires administrator permission).
db.bk_404:
Could not find `re_posts_channel` in data!
-# Hint: Run `/database RedditChannel` in a (preferably read-only) channel (requires administrator permission).
db.channel_bind: Successfully added channel ID `{0}` to the database!
db.not_in_guild: I am not a part of that guild.

wwrps.submitting: Submitting your RPS... Please wait for another contestant to compete against you.
wwrps.already_submitted: You can't compete against yourself! Please wait until another player has submitted their RPS.

dc.shutdown_bad_confirm: Failed to shut down: Invalid confirmation.
dc.cmd_404:
No command "{0}" found!
Hint: Try `/help` without any arguments or `/help <category>`

re.suffix: ^(I am not an AI, I am just a bot. This action was performed automatically by the way. You can report bugs and view my source code [here](https://github.com/ByteDice/ByteDiceAssistant)!)
re.add: Successfully added your post to the weekly art submissions! Thank you for participating!
re.exists: Couldn't add this post to the submissions! Luckily, it's already there! Thank you for participating!
re.mod_add: [MOD ACTION] Successfully added this post to the weekly art submissions!
re.mod_unremove: [MOD ACTION] Successfully un-removed this post from the weekly art submissions!

lang_load: Successfully loaded the english language file!
